summary: A Go-based testing and validation framework featuring a universal detector, Goss migration tooling, and MCP integration, heavily utilizing AI-agent generated tests.
concerns: High volume of auto-generated test directories (glm-agents) polluting the repository structure
Untracked and unstaged files in git status indicating potential workflow instability
Rapid expansion of assertion types (ICMP, MongoDB, Kafka, LDAP, MQTT, NFS) may lead to maintenance burden
suggestions: Clean up or archive the GOrchestra/glm-agents directories to reduce repository noise
Commit or stash the 6 modified and 6 untracked files to stabilize the working tree
Consider abstracting the assertion implementations into plugins to handle the growing complexity
